name: Senior - Engineering Management
description: Executive template for senior engineers and engineering managers.

content.summary: Strategic engineering leader with 10+ years of experience building and scaling high-performing engineering teams. Track record of delivering complex technical initiatives that drive business growth, managing teams of 15+ engineers, and establishing engineering best practices across organizations.

experience.title: Engineering Manager
bullets: Led a team of 15 engineers across 3 squads, delivering a platform serving 2M+ daily active users
Drove engineering roadmap resulting in 40% improvement in system reliability (99.95% → 99.99% uptime)
Established hiring pipeline that reduced time-to-hire by 30% and improved retention by 25%
Implemented OKR framework and quarterly planning process adopted across the engineering org
Managed $2M annual infrastructure budget, achieving 20% cost reduction through strategic optimization

experience.title: Staff Software Engineer
bullets: Architected microservices platform processing $50M+ in annual transactions
Led cross-functional initiative to modernize legacy systems, reducing technical debt by 60%
Mentored 8 engineers, with 3 promoted to senior roles within 18 months
